title: paeonia delavayi f. alba
intro: Paeonia delavayi f. alba is a white-flowering variant of the Paeonia delavayi plant, a species of peony native to the mountainous regions of China. As a member of the Paeonia genus, this plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia delavayi f. alba include reducing pain and inflammation, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. In herbal preparations, the root of the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being processed into capsules or tinctures for convenient consumption.
